Test Name: Browser workflow supports upload comparison and download
Purpose: Golden-path test: RFI input → Salesforce upload → comparison → results download

Test Name: Manual RFI rows do not prepopulate the created date
Purpose: Ensures manually added RFI rows have empty Created Date (user-supplied, not auto-populated)

Test Name: Importing one RFI CSV row reuses the initial blank submission row
Purpose: Single CSV import populates initial row instead of creating duplicate, prevents row proliferation

Test Name: Browser workflow rejects Salesforce uploads over the 500-row limit
Purpose: Boundary test: 501-row Salesforce CSV upload exceeds limit, compare disabled, error shown

Test Name: Dashboard RFI CSV import rejects files over the 500-row limit
Purpose: Boundary test: 501-row RFI import exceeds limit, existing blank row preserved

Test Name: Test data generator view can generate and download a synthetic record
Purpose: Synthetic record generation with configurable identifiers and JSON download

Test Name: Test data generator supports international phone output
Purpose: International phone format generation renders a +prefixed number in output

Test Name: Test data generator generates batch with adjustable size via plus and minus controls
Purpose: Batch size controls increment and decrement generated row count

Test Name: Injecting generated test data clears stale comparison results
Purpose: Generated RFI injection invalidates prior comparison results and disables stale downloads

Test Name: normalizeDate converts serial dates into ISO values
Purpose: Serial date conversion to ISO format, cross-format compatibility

Test Name: parseCsv handles quoted commas and canonical header aliases
Purpose: CSV parsing with quoted values and header canonicalization

Test Name: calculateFileDiagnostics recognizes expected fields from aliased headers
Purpose: Header recognition with field aliases, all 7 expected fields recognized

Test Name: compareRecord rejects otherwise strong matches when email does not match exactly
Purpose: Email is a gating field (exact match required), rejects partial matches

Test Name: compareRecord treats military service value 1 as an exact match for checked RFIs
Purpose: Military service value 1 equals RFI true, numeric-to-boolean equivalence

Test Name: compareRecord treats military service value 0 as a false value instead of a missing field
Purpose: Military service 0 is explicit false, not blank/null

Test Name: compareRecord flags military service as a mismatch when Salesforce is true and RFI is blank
Purpose: Mismatch when Salesforce checked but RFI blank/unchecked

Test Name: compareRecord keeps military service inactive when neither RFI nor Salesforce is true
Purpose: When both are false/blank, status is inactive not matched

Test Name: selectBestUniqueMatches assigns distinct Salesforce records to competing RFIs
Purpose: One-to-one matching prevents Salesforce record reuse, no double-matching

Test Name: canonicalizeRecord maps military service and military status headers to the same field
Purpose: Field alias consolidation (Military Service vs Military Status)

Test Name: displayFieldValue renders normalized military service labels
Purpose: UI label normalization: blank→Blank, unchecked→False, 0→False, Yes→True

Test Name: validateRecordCount rejects uploads over the 500-row limit
Purpose: Boundary validation at 500-row limit (501 rows rejected)

Test Name: profile navigation and view are present in index.html
Purpose: Profile view UI elements exist and are connected

Test Name: bulk import panel exposes the sample RFI CSV download
Purpose: Sample CSV link is present and correctly named

Test Name: sample RFI CSV includes the expected import headers
Purpose: Sample CSV has correct import column headers

Test Name: index.html defines a restrictive client-side CSP
Purpose: Content-Security-Policy hardened headers block XSS and data exfiltration

Test Name: index.html disables referrer leakage and sensitive browser permissions
Purpose: Privacy and permission restrictions (no camera, mic, geolocation, referrer)
